changes.title: Tandem garage → Bedroom 4 + walk-in robe + ensuite
changes.rationale: Largest single lever: 32.4 m² of room-sized, street-fronting floor area. Moves the property from the 3b/1b comp pool into the 4b/2b pool in one step; the second bathroom alone carries roughly a +$100/wk premium locally.

notes: Change of use garage → habitable + loss of covered parking (Hornsby DCP) — DA likely, CDC possible if Housing Code criteria met
Habitable room: ≥2.4 m ceiling, natural light ~10% / ventilation ~5% of floor area — new street-facing window(s)
Slab floor level, damp-proofing and insulation (BASIX) to habitable standard
Ensuite drainage is a new run remote from the east wet stack — hydraulic advice

changes.title: Enclose balcony (7.5 × 2.9 m) → new living area, opened to kitchen/dining
changes.rationale: Adds 21.8 m² of internal living under the existing roofline and creates an open-plan living/dining/kitchen across the north face. Modest direct uplift, but it is the structural prerequisite for converting the lounge to Bedroom 5 in a later version without gutting liveability.

notes: Opening the former external wall between balcony and kitchen/dining is structural (likely load-bearing under the roof) — engineer first; pathway likely CDC/DA once engineered
Former balcony floor: waterproofing, floor level step and insulation to habitable standard; balustrade edge becomes a glazed external wall (BASIX)
Dining and kitchen then borrow light through the enclosed zone — check natural light/ventilation ratios still met
External stair off the balcony is absorbed — retain/relocate yard access and check egress
